title: Lamplugh Glacier aerial view
description: Aerial view of Lamplugh Glacier in Glacier Bay National Park showing the full length of the ice flow from the high peaks down to tidewater, with a cruise ship at the terminus for scale and a dark landslide scar visible on the upper glacier surface.
alt: A cruise ship is dwarfed by an expansive sheet of glacial ice at Lamplugh Glacier
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from nps.gov Lamplugh Glacier place page, visually confirmed
